title: linaria multicaulis subsp. humilis
intro: Linaria multicaulis subsp. humilis, also known as the dwarf toadflax, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae). The medicinal properties of Linaria multicaulis subsp. humilis include its ability to act as a diuretic and a digestive aid, and it is also used to treat various respiratory issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to help reduce fever, alleviate coughs and colds, and promote digestion, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various ailments. Linaria multicaulis subsp. humilis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing individuals to harness its medicinal properties in a convenient and accessible way.
